text.title: HAProxy Production Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (protocol mix, HA need, rate-limit need) to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: HTTPS frontend with TLS 1.2+ bind options + modern ciphers
HTTP frontend; size maxconn from RAM
separate frontend blocks (mode tcp for DB, mode http for web); nbthread+cpu-map for parallelism
declare stick-table + deny on http_req_rate threshold
add http-check expect status 200 to every backend

text.example: protocol=http_only → public=true → TLS 1.2+ bind → rate_limit_needed=true → stick-table 100/10s → ha_required=true → anycast=false → keepalived VRRP → satisfies 4 rules.
